name: Pink Skin - multi-tenant Telegram moderation bot
description: Multi-tenant Telegram group moderation bot (one BotFather token, isolation by chat_id). Vector-similarity aiban, 3-layer antispam + CAS reputation, entitlement-gated tenancy, Postgres+pgvector storage.

bot_token.description: Telegram Bot API token from BotFather. Privacy mode MUST be OFF; bot must be admin with can_restrict/can_delete.

superadmin_id.description: Bootstrap superadmin Telegram user id (seeded once; further admins via /addadmin).

pg_host.description: PostgreSQL host (host DB from the relay container).

onboarding_message.default: This group has no pink_skin subscription. Contact the operator to get access.
onboarding_message.description: Posted before leaveChat when added to an unentitled group (hot-editable via /setsetting onboarding_message).

parameters.script:
# pink_skin :: schema init (one-shot, fired by startupTrigger)
# Provisions the Postgres schema (pgvector), seeds the bootstrap superadmin and
# default platform settings. Idempotent: safe to run on every flow start.
import json
from core.embeddings import build_memory_embed_fn

_probe = build_memory_embed_fn()('dimension probe')
if not _probe:
    raise ValueError('embedding backend unavailable; configure ${embedding_llm_service} (global) or install the builtin local model')
EMBED_DIM = len(_probe)
SUPERADMIN_ID = '''${superadmin_id}'''.strip()
ONBOARDING_MSG = '''${onboarding_message}'''

db = get_service('group_db')


def ddl(sql):
    db.execute_update(sql)


ddl("CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector")

ddl("""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS platform_admins (
    user_id    BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
    role       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'admin',
    added_by   BIGINT,
    added_at   TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
)""")

ddl("""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS platform_settings (
    key        TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    value      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
)""")

ddl("""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS entitlements (
    id          BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    owner_id    BIGINT NOT NULL,
    plan        TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'standard',
    status      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
    seats       INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    used_seats  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    expires_at  TIMESTAMPTZ,
    note        TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
)""")

ddl("""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS groups (
    chat_id        BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
    title          TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    status         TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'provisioned',
    entitlement_id BIGINT REFERENCES entitlements(id),
    joined_at      TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    activated_at   TIMESTAMPTZ,
    expires_at     TIMESTAMPTZ
)""")

ddl("""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS group_owners (
    chat_id  BIGINT NOT NULL,
    user_id  BIGINT NOT NULL,
    role     TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'owner',
    added_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    PRIMARY KEY (chat_id, user_id)
)""")

ddl("""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS group_config (
    chat_id          BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
    aiban_action     TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'mute',
    aiban_threshold  REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.86,
    aiban_gate       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'risky',
    antiflood_max    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 8,
    antiflood_window INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
    cas_enabled      BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    welcome          TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    updated_at       TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
)""")

ddl("""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS aiban_samples (
    id          BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    chat_id     BIGINT,
    category    TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'spam',
    action      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'mute',
    sample_text TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    embedding   vector(%d) NOT NULL,
    added_by    BIGINT,
    created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
)""" % EMBED_DIM)

ddl("""
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS aiban_samples_embedding_idx
    ON aiban_samples USING hnsw (embedding vector_cosine_ops)""")
ddl("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS aiban_samples_chat_idx ON aiban_samples (chat_id)")

ddl("""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blacklist_patterns (
    id         BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    chat_id    BIGINT,
    pattern    TEXT NOT NULL,
    action     TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'mute',
    added_by   BIGINT,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
)""")

ddl("""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS reputation_cache (
    user_id    BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
    verdict    TEXT NOT NULL,
    source     TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'cas',
    checked_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
)""")

ddl("""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS antiflood (
    chat_id      BIGINT NOT NULL,
    user_id      BIGINT NOT NULL,
    window_start TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    count        INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    PRIMARY KEY (chat_id, user_id)
)""")

ddl("""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS restrictions (
    id         BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    chat_id    BIGINT NOT NULL,
    user_id    BIGINT NOT NULL,
    action     TEXT NOT NULL,
    until_ts   TIMESTAMPTZ,
    reason     TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    active     BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
)""")
ddl("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS restrictions_active_idx ON restrictions (active, until_ts)")

# ── Seed bootstrap superadmin (param only bootstraps; further admins live in DB)
if SUPERADMIN_ID:
    db.execute_update(
        "INSERT INTO platform_admins (user_id, role, added_by) "
        "VALUES (%(uid)s, 'superadmin', %(uid)s) "
        "ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET role='superadmin'",
        {"uid": int(SUPERADMIN_ID)})

# ── Default platform settings (configurable hot via /setsetting)
db.execute_update(
    "INSERT INTO platform_settings (key, value) VALUES ('onboarding_message', %(v)s) "
    "ON CONFLICT (key) DO NOTHING",
    {"v": ONBOARDING_MSG})

result = 'pink_skin schema ready (embed_dim=%d, superadmin=%s)' % (
    EMBED_DIM, SUPERADMIN_ID or 'none')

# pink_skin :: router + handlers
# One executeScript that classifies a Telegram update and dispatches it to
# onboarding / command / moderation / dm handling. Side-effects (ban/mute/
# delete/leave) go through telegram_bot.call_api; persistence through group_db;
# vectors through the builtin embedder (build_memory_embed_fn, same as memory).
# `result` is the reply text to send (or '').
import json
import re
from core.embeddings import build_memory_embed_fn

_embed = build_memory_embed_fn()

db = get_service('group_db')
tg = get_service('telegram_bot')


def q(sql, params=None):
    return db.execute_query(sql, params)


def u(sql, params=None):
    return db.execute_update(sql, params)


def api(method, params):
    try:
        return tg.call_api(method, params)
    except Exception as e:
        return {'_error': str(e)}


# ── attributes ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
upd = attributes.get('telegram.update_type', 'message')
mtype = attributes.get('telegram.message_type', 'text')
chat_id = attributes.get('telegram.chat_id', '').strip()
chat_type = attributes.get('telegram.chat_type', '')
user_id = attributes.get('telegram.user_id', '').strip()
username = attributes.get('telegram.username', '')
msg_id = attributes.get('telegram.message_id', '')
text = (content or '').strip()
chat_bigint = int(chat_id) if chat_id.lstrip('-').isdigit() else None
user_bigint = int(user_id) if user_id.isdigit() else None

result = ''


# ── helpers: tenancy ────────────────────────────────────────────────
def is_platform_admin(uid):
    if uid is None:
        return False
    rows = q("SELECT role FROM platform_admins WHERE user_id=%(u)s", {'u': uid})
    return rows[0]['role'] if rows else None


def is_group_owner(cid, uid):
    if cid is None or uid is None:
        return False
    rows = q("SELECT 1 FROM group_owners WHERE chat_id=%(c)s AND user_id=%(u)s",
             {'c': cid, 'u': uid})
    return bool(rows)


def group_row(cid):
    rows = q("SELECT * FROM groups WHERE chat_id=%(c)s", {'c': cid})
    return rows[0] if rows else None


def group_cfg(cid):
    rows = q("SELECT * FROM group_config WHERE chat_id=%(c)s", {'c': cid})
    if rows:
        return rows[0]
    u("INSERT INTO group_config (chat_id) VALUES (%(c)s) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING",
      {'c': cid})
    rows = q("SELECT * FROM group_config WHERE chat_id=%(c)s", {'c': cid})
    return rows[0] if rows else {}


def setting(key, default=''):
    rows = q("SELECT value FROM platform_settings WHERE key=%(k)s", {'k': key})
    return rows[0]['value'] if rows else default


def can_moderate(cid):
    """Group is active and entitled -> moderation is on."""
    g = group_row(cid)
    return bool(g and g.get('status') == 'active')


# ── helpers: telegram actions ───────────────────────────────────────
def delete_message(cid, mid):
    if mid:
        api('deleteMessage', {'chat_id': cid, 'message_id': int(mid)})


def mute(cid, uid, seconds=3600):
    import time
    until = int(time.time()) + int(seconds)
    api('restrictChatMember', {
        'chat_id': cid, 'user_id': uid,
        'permissions': {'can_send_messages': False},
        'until_date': until,
    })
    u("INSERT INTO restrictions (chat_id,user_id,action,until_ts,reason) "
      "VALUES (%(c)s,%(u)s,'mute', to_timestamp(%(t)s), %(r)s)",
      {'c': int(cid), 'u': int(uid), 't': until, 'r': 'auto'})


def ban(cid, uid):
    api('banChatMember', {'chat_id': cid, 'user_id': uid})
    u("INSERT INTO restrictions (chat_id,user_id,action,reason) "
      "VALUES (%(c)s,%(u)s,'ban',%(r)s)",
      {'c': int(cid), 'u': int(uid), 'r': 'auto'})


def apply_action(action, cid, uid, mid):
    delete_message(cid, mid)
    if action == 'ban':
        ban(cid, uid)
    else:
        mute(cid, uid)


# ── helpers: vectors / aiban ────────────────────────────────────────
_LINK_RE = re.compile(r'(https?://|t\.me/|@\w{3,})', re.I)


def vec_literal(text_in):
    emb = _embed(text_in)
    if not emb:
        raise ValueError('embedding backend returned no vector')
    return '[' + ','.join('%.6f' % x for x in emb) + ']'


def gate_triggers(cfg, text_in):
    gate = (cfg or {}).get('aiban_gate', 'risky')
    if gate == 'all':
        return True
    # risky: link/mention OR recently-seen user (joined within reputation window)
    if _LINK_RE.search(text_in or ''):
        return True
    entities = attributes.get('telegram.entities', '')
    if entities and ('url' in entities or 'mention' in entities):
        return True
    return False


def aiban_check(cid, text_in, cfg):
    """Return (action, sim) if nearest spam vector >= threshold, else None."""
    if not text_in:
        return None
    threshold = float((cfg or {}).get('aiban_threshold', 0.86))
    lit = vec_literal(text_in)
    rows = q(
        "SELECT action, 1 - (embedding <=> %(v)s::vector) AS sim "
        "FROM aiban_samples "
        "WHERE chat_id IS NULL OR chat_id=%(c)s "
        "ORDER BY embedding <=> %(v)s::vector LIMIT 1",
        {'v': lit, 'c': cid})
    if rows and float(rows[0]['sim']) >= threshold:
        return (rows[0]['action'] or cfg.get('aiban_action', 'mute'),
                float(rows[0]['sim']))
    return None


# ── helpers: cheap antispam layers ──────────────────────────────────
def blacklist_hit(cid, text_in):
    rows = q("SELECT pattern, action FROM blacklist_patterns "
             "WHERE chat_id IS NULL OR chat_id=%(c)s", {'c': cid})
    for r in rows:
        try:
            if re.search(r['pattern'], text_in, re.I):
                return r['action'] or 'mute'
        except re.error:
            continue
    return None


def antiflood_hit(cid, uid, cfg):
    mx = int((cfg or {}).get('antiflood_max', 8))
    win = int((cfg or {}).get('antiflood_window', 10))
    rows = q("SELECT count, extract(epoch from (now()-window_start)) AS age "
             "FROM antiflood WHERE chat_id=%(c)s AND user_id=%(u)s",
             {'c': cid, 'u': uid})
    if not rows or float(rows[0]['age']) > win:
        u("INSERT INTO antiflood (chat_id,user_id,window_start,count) "
          "VALUES (%(c)s,%(u)s,now(),1) "
          "ON CONFLICT (chat_id,user_id) DO UPDATE SET window_start=now(), count=1",
          {'c': cid, 'u': uid})
        return False
    u("UPDATE antiflood SET count=count+1 WHERE chat_id=%(c)s AND user_id=%(u)s",
      {'c': cid, 'u': uid})
    return (int(rows[0]['count']) + 1) > mx


def reputation_check(cid, uid):
    """CAS lookup (cached). Returns 'banned' if flagged, else None."""
    rows = q("SELECT verdict, extract(epoch from (now()-checked_at)) AS age "
             "FROM reputation_cache WHERE user_id=%(u)s", {'u': uid})
    if rows and float(rows[0]['age']) < 86400:
        return rows[0]['verdict'] if rows[0]['verdict'] == 'banned' else None
    verdict = 'ok'
    try:
        import urllib.request
        with urllib.request.urlopen(
                'https://api.cas.chat/check?user_id=%d' % uid, timeout=5) as r:
            data = json.loads(r.read().decode())
        if data.get('ok'):
            verdict = 'banned'
    except Exception:
        verdict = 'unknown'
    u("INSERT INTO reputation_cache (user_id,verdict,source) "
      "VALUES (%(u)s,%(v)s,'cas') "
      "ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET verdict=%(v)s, checked_at=now()",
      {'u': uid, 'v': verdict})
    return 'banned' if verdict == 'banned' else None


# ── command handler ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
def strip_cmd(t):
    head = t.split()[0]
    head = head.split('@')[0]  # /cmd@BotName -> /cmd
    args = t.split()[1:]
    return head.lower(), args


def handle_command(t):
    cmd, args = strip_cmd(t)
    role = is_platform_admin(user_bigint)
    is_super = role == 'superadmin'
    is_admin = role in ('superadmin', 'admin')
    is_owner = is_admin or is_group_owner(chat_bigint, user_bigint)

    if cmd == '/help':
        return ('pink_skin commands:\n'
                '/status - group status\n'
                '/aiban [ban|mute] (reply) - learn a spam sample\n'
                '/setaction ban|mute, /setthreshold <0..1>, /setgate risky|all\n'
                '/setflood <max> <window_s>, /welcome <text>\n'
                '/blacklist <regex> [ban|mute], /unblacklist <id>\n'
                'admin: /grant <owner_id> [seats] [days], /provision [owner_id], '
                '/suspend, /activate\n'
                'superadmin: /addadmin <id>, /deladmin <id>, /setsetting <key> <value>')

    if cmd == '/status':
        g = group_row(chat_bigint) or {}
        c = group_cfg(chat_bigint) or {}
        return ('status=%s action=%s threshold=%s gate=%s flood=%s/%ss cas=%s'
                % (g.get('status', '-'), c.get('aiban_action'),
                   c.get('aiban_threshold'), c.get('aiban_gate'),
                   c.get('antiflood_max'), c.get('antiflood_window'),
                   c.get('cas_enabled')))

    # ── superadmin ──
    if cmd == '/addadmin' and is_super and args:
        u("INSERT INTO platform_admins (user_id,role,added_by) "
          "VALUES (%(u)s,'admin',%(by)s) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET role='admin'",
          {'u': int(args[0]), 'by': user_bigint})
        return 'admin added: ' + args[0]
    if cmd == '/deladmin' and is_super and args:
        u("DELETE FROM platform_admins WHERE user_id=%(u)s AND role<>'superadmin'",
          {'u': int(args[0])})
        return 'admin removed: ' + args[0]
    if cmd == '/setsetting' and is_super and len(args) >= 2:
        u("INSERT INTO platform_settings (key,value,updated_at) "
          "VALUES (%(k)s,%(v)s,now()) ON CONFLICT (key) "
          "DO UPDATE SET value=%(v)s, updated_at=now()",
          {'k': args[0], 'v': ' '.join(args[1:])})
        return 'setting %s updated' % args[0]

    # ── platform admin: entitlements / provisioning ──
    if cmd == '/grant' and is_admin and args:
        owner = int(args[0])
        seats = int(args[1]) if len(args) > 1 else 1
        days = int(args[2]) if len(args) > 2 else 0
        exp = 'now() + (%d || \' days\')::interval' % days if days else 'NULL'
        rows = q("INSERT INTO entitlements (owner_id,seats,expires_at) "
                 "VALUES (%(o)s,%(s)s," + exp + ") RETURNING id",
                 {'o': owner, 's': seats})
        return 'entitlement #%s for %d (%d seats)' % (rows[0]['id'], owner, seats)
    if cmd == '/provision' and is_admin and chat_bigint is not None:
        owner = int(args[0]) if args else user_bigint
        _activate_group(chat_bigint, owner)
        return 'group provisioned & active (owner %d)' % owner
    if cmd == '/suspend' and is_admin and chat_bigint is not None:
        u("UPDATE groups SET status='suspended' WHERE chat_id=%(c)s", {'c': chat_bigint})
        return 'group suspended'
    if cmd == '/activate' and is_admin and chat_bigint is not None:
        u("UPDATE groups SET status='active', activated_at=now() WHERE chat_id=%(c)s",
          {'c': chat_bigint})
        return 'group active'

    # ── owner/admin: config + learning ──
    if not is_owner:
        return ''  # unknown or unauthorized command: stay silent

    if cmd == '/aiban':
        return handle_aiban(args)
    if cmd == '/setaction' and args and args[0] in ('ban', 'mute'):
        _cfg_set('aiban_action', args[0])
        return 'aiban action = ' + args[0]
    if cmd == '/setthreshold' and args:
        _cfg_set('aiban_threshold', float(args[0]))
        return 'threshold = ' + args[0]
    if cmd == '/setgate' and args and args[0] in ('risky', 'all'):
        _cfg_set('aiban_gate', args[0])
        return 'gate = ' + args[0]
    if cmd == '/setflood' and len(args) >= 2:
        _cfg_set('antiflood_max', int(args[0]))
        _cfg_set('antiflood_window', int(args[1]))
        return 'antiflood = %s/%ss' % (args[0], args[1])
    if cmd == '/welcome':
        _cfg_set('welcome', ' '.join(args))
        return 'welcome message updated'
    if cmd == '/blacklist' and args:
        action = args[-1] if args[-1] in ('ban', 'mute') else 'mute'
        pat = ' '.join(args[:-1]) if args[-1] in ('ban', 'mute') else ' '.join(args)
        u("INSERT INTO blacklist_patterns (chat_id,pattern,action,added_by) "
          "VALUES (%(c)s,%(p)s,%(a)s,%(b)s)",
          {'c': chat_bigint, 'p': pat, 'a': action, 'b': user_bigint})
        return 'blacklist pattern added'
    if cmd == '/unblacklist' and args:
        u("DELETE FROM blacklist_patterns WHERE id=%(i)s AND "
          "(chat_id=%(c)s OR chat_id IS NULL)",
          {'i': int(args[0]), 'c': chat_bigint})
        return 'blacklist pattern removed'
    if cmd == '/unban':
        target = attributes.get('telegram.reply_to_user_id', '')
        if target.isdigit():
            api('unbanChatMember', {'chat_id': chat_bigint, 'user_id': int(target),
                                    'only_if_banned': True})
            u("UPDATE restrictions SET active=FALSE WHERE chat_id=%(c)s AND user_id=%(u)s",
              {'c': chat_bigint, 'u': int(target)})
            return 'unbanned ' + target
    return ''


def _cfg_set(key, value):
    group_cfg(chat_bigint)
    u("UPDATE group_config SET " + key + "=%(v)s, updated_at=now() WHERE chat_id=%(c)s",
      {'v': value, 'c': chat_bigint})


def _activate_group(cid, owner):
    u("INSERT INTO groups (chat_id,status,activated_at) "
      "VALUES (%(c)s,'active',now()) "
      "ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO UPDATE SET status='active', activated_at=now()",
      {'c': cid})
    u("INSERT INTO group_owners (chat_id,user_id) VALUES (%(c)s,%(u)s) "
      "ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING", {'c': cid, 'u': owner})
    group_cfg(cid)


def handle_aiban(args):
    sample = attributes.get('telegram.reply_to_text', '').strip()
    if not sample:
        return 'Reply to a spam message with /aiban to learn it.'
    action = args[0] if args and args[0] in ('ban', 'mute') else \
        (group_cfg(chat_bigint) or {}).get('aiban_action', 'mute')
    category = 'spam'
    try:
        mod = get_service('mod_llm')
        resp = mod.complete(
            [{'role': 'system', 'content': 'Classify the message in one lowercase '
              'word (spam, scam, ad, flood, nsfw, ok). Answer with the word only.'},
             {'role': 'user', 'content': sample}],
            max_tokens=4, temperature=0)
        cat = (getattr(resp, 'content', '') or '').strip().lower().split()
        if cat:
            category = cat[0]
    except Exception:
        pass
    if category == 'ok':
        return 'Classifier says this is not spam; not learned.'
    lit = vec_literal(sample)
    u("INSERT INTO aiban_samples (chat_id,category,action,sample_text,embedding,added_by) "
      "VALUES (%(c)s,%(cat)s,%(a)s,%(t)s,%(v)s::vector,%(b)s)",
      {'c': chat_bigint, 'cat': category, 'a': action, 't': sample[:2000],
       'v': lit, 'b': user_bigint})
    # Punish the original sender too.
    tgt = attributes.get('telegram.reply_to_user_id', '')
    rmid = attributes.get('telegram.reply_to_message_id', '')
    if tgt.isdigit():
        apply_action(action, chat_bigint, int(tgt), rmid)
    return 'Learned (%s -> %s).' % (category, action)


# ── onboarding (bot membership changes) ─────────────────────────────
def handle_my_chat_member():
    new_status = attributes.get('telegram.new_status', '')
    old_status = attributes.get('telegram.old_status', '')
    added = new_status in ('member', 'administrator') and \
        old_status in ('left', 'kicked', '')
    removed = new_status in ('left', 'kicked')
    if removed:
        if chat_bigint is not None:
            u("UPDATE groups SET status='suspended' WHERE chat_id=%(c)s",
              {'c': chat_bigint})
        return ''
    if not added or chat_bigint is None:
        return ''
    g = group_row(chat_bigint)
    if g and g.get('status') in ('active', 'provisioned'):
        u("UPDATE groups SET status='active', activated_at=now() WHERE chat_id=%(c)s",
          {'c': chat_bigint})
        return (group_cfg(chat_bigint) or {}).get('welcome', '') or ''
    # adder may consume an available entitlement seat
    adder = user_bigint
    ent = q("SELECT id, seats, used_seats FROM entitlements "
            "WHERE owner_id=%(o)s AND status='active' "
            "AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now()) "
            "AND used_seats < seats ORDER BY id LIMIT 1", {'o': adder}) if adder else []
    if ent:
        eid = ent[0]['id']
        u("UPDATE entitlements SET used_seats=used_seats+1 WHERE id=%(i)s", {'i': eid})
        u("INSERT INTO groups (chat_id,status,entitlement_id,activated_at) "
          "VALUES (%(c)s,'active',%(e)s,now()) "
          "ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO UPDATE SET status='active', entitlement_id=%(e)s, "
          "activated_at=now()", {'c': chat_bigint, 'e': eid})
        u("INSERT INTO group_owners (chat_id,user_id) VALUES (%(c)s,%(u)s) "
          "ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING", {'c': chat_bigint, 'u': adder})
        group_cfg(chat_bigint)
        return 'pink_skin is active in this group.'
    # no entitlement -> anti-squat: greet once and leave
    msg = setting('onboarding_message', 'This group has no pink_skin subscription.')
    api('sendMessage', {'chat_id': chat_bigint, 'text': msg})
    api('leaveChat', {'chat_id': chat_bigint})
    return ''


# ── join handler (new members) ──────────────────────────────────────
def handle_new_members():
    if not can_moderate(chat_bigint):
        return ''
    cfg = group_cfg(chat_bigint)
    ids = [i for i in attributes.get('telegram.new_chat_member_ids', '').split(',') if i]
    welcomed = False
    for sid in ids:
        if not sid.isdigit():
            continue
        uid = int(sid)
        if cfg.get('cas_enabled', True) and reputation_check(chat_bigint, uid) == 'banned':
            ban(chat_bigint, uid)
            delete_message(chat_bigint, msg_id)
            continue
        welcomed = True
    wmsg = (cfg or {}).get('welcome', '')
    return wmsg if (welcomed and wmsg) else ''


# ── moderation pipeline (normal group text) ─────────────────────────
def handle_moderation():
    if not can_moderate(chat_bigint):
        return ''
    if is_platform_admin(user_bigint) or is_group_owner(chat_bigint, user_bigint):
        return ''
    cfg = group_cfg(chat_bigint)
    hit = blacklist_hit(chat_bigint, text)
    if hit:
        apply_action(hit, chat_bigint, user_bigint, msg_id)
        return ''
    if antiflood_hit(chat_bigint, user_bigint, cfg):
        apply_action('mute', chat_bigint, user_bigint, msg_id)
        return ''
    if gate_triggers(cfg, text):
        verdict = aiban_check(chat_bigint, text, cfg)
        if verdict:
            apply_action(verdict[0], chat_bigint, user_bigint, msg_id)
    return ''


# ── main dispatch ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
if upd == 'my_chat_member':
    result = handle_my_chat_member()
elif upd == 'chat_member':
    result = ''
elif attributes.get('telegram.new_chat_member_ids'):
    result = handle_new_members()
elif chat_type in ('group', 'supergroup'):
    if text.startswith('/'):
        result = handle_command(text)
    else:
        result = handle_moderation()
elif chat_type == 'private':
    if text.startswith('/'):
        result = handle_command(text)
    else:
        result = ('pink_skin moderation bot. Add me to your group as admin. '
                  'Send /help for commands.')
else:
    result = ''

# pink_skin :: expire groups whose entitlement lapsed; suspend them
db = get_service('group_db')
tg = get_service('telegram_bot')
db.execute_update(
    "UPDATE entitlements SET status='expired' "
    "WHERE status='active' AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at <= now()")
rows = db.execute_query(
    "SELECT g.chat_id FROM groups g JOIN entitlements e ON g.entitlement_id=e.id "
    "WHERE g.status='active' AND e.status='expired'")
expired = 0
for r in rows:
    db.execute_update("UPDATE groups SET status='expired' WHERE chat_id=%(c)s",
                      {'c': r['chat_id']})
    try:
        tg.call_api('sendMessage', {'chat_id': int(r['chat_id']),
                    'text': 'pink_skin subscription expired; moderation paused.'})
    except Exception:
        pass
    expired += 1
result = 'expired %d group(s)' % expired

# pink_skin :: prune stale reputation cache + old antiflood windows
db = get_service('group_db')
n1 = db.execute_update("DELETE FROM reputation_cache WHERE checked_at < now() - interval '7 days'")
n2 = db.execute_update("DELETE FROM antiflood WHERE window_start < now() - interval '1 day'")
result = 'pruned rep=%s flood=%s' % (n1, n2)
